channel.title: INartsAndEnt
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from INartsAndEnt, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Cop Pulls Woman From Burning Vehicle After Carjacking Crash, on Video
item.description: Police in Florida saved a woman from a burning car in the nick of time ... after an alleged carjacker stole another vehicle with a baby inside and cra...

item.title: Influencer Yonna Jay Says Streaming Is Replacing TV
item.description: Television is going the way of the dodo, a popular influencer says ... because streaming is on the way to usurp the old mass media technology. We caug...

item.title: Britney Spears Seen Out for First Time Since Selling Music Catalog
item.description: Britney Spears is carrying on as if nothing happened ... spotted doing everyday errands like she didn’t just cash in one of the most iconic catalogs i...

item.title: 'Love Island' Jeremiah Brown Says Valentine's Day Looks 'Bleak' for Him
item.description: Looks like Jeremiah Brown’s "Love Island" luck didn’t follow him back to the mainland ... 'cause he tells us his Valentine’s Day is shaping up to be a...

item.title: Stefon Diggs Pleads Not Guilty Assaulting Chef Days After Super Bowl
item.description: Stefon Diggs appeared in court on Friday for his arraignment over the alleged assault of his personal chef, with the NFL star pleading not guilty just...

item.title: The Lincoln Lawyer’s Season 4 Character Death Pays Tribute To George Clooney's 3-Part Crime Thriller
Zootopia 2’s Record-Breaking Box Office Run Is About To Lose Its Advantage
Johnny Depp's Pirates Of The Caribbean Fate Will Likely Be Determined This Year
